contract_registry.name: evidence index output
contract_registry.signature: --evidence-index-output PATH writes canonical seven-record index after successful validation

contract_registry.name: qualification report verifier
contract_registry.signature: --report PATH [--candidate PATH --candidate-sha256 PATH --index PATH --index-sha256 PATH --envelope PATH --envelope-sha256 PATH --validator-result PATH --validator-result-sha256 PATH --publication-epoch INTEGER]

contract_registry.name: accepted evidence markers
contract_registry.signature: exact BEGIN/END WAVE5 ACCEPTED EVIDENCE region with canonical JSON, checksum, acceptance URL

contract_registry.name: validator result acceptance clock
contract_registry.signature: validator result includes accepted_at_epoch equal to the injected acceptance epoch
